address.description: DNS address for connecting to the Neptune cluster instance

arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM and API operations

dbi_resource_id.description: Unique database resource ID for tracking the cluster instance

endpoint.description: Endpoint URL for connecting applications to the database

id.description: Unique identifier for the Neptune cluster instance

kms_key_arn.description: ARN of the KMS key used for encrypting the database instance

storage_encrypted.description: Indicates if storage encryption is enabled for the instance

storage_type.description: Specifies the storage type used by the Neptune instance

tags_all.description: Consolidated list of tags assigned to the Neptune instance

writer.description: Indicates if the instance acts as the writer in the cluster
